text.value:
UPDATE dbo.tb_ap_invoices_staging
    SET processed_bit = 1, processed_at = GETDATE()
    WHERE processed_bit = 0

    UPDATE dbo.tb_ap_invoice_lines_staging
    SET processed_bit = 1, processed_at = GETDATE()
     WHERE processed_bit = 0

value.value: @concat(activity('Load data to AP table').output.pipelineReturnValue.job_name,': ', activity('Load data to AP table').output.pipelineReturnValue.final_status)

text.value:
INSERT INTO [dbo].[tb_camsis_notification]
(
    PipelineId,
    SupplierNumber,
    InvoiceNumber,
    InvoiceStatus,
    Errors
)
SELECT
    '@{pipeline().RunId}' AS PipelineId,
    s.SupplierNumber,
    s.InvoiceNumber,
    s.validation_status AS InvoiceStatus,
    'Failed At Mandatory Validations' AS Errors
FROM dbo.tb_ap_invoices_staging AS s
WHERE validation_status = 'Validation Failed'
